rationale: Section 49.011 is a contingency provision triggered by court invalidation of wealth-equalization options under Section 49.002. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13, so no direct conflict arises.
quote: If any of the options described by Section 49.002 as applied to a school district are held invalid by a final decision of a court of competent jurisdiction, a school district is entitled to exercise any of the remaining valid options in accordance with a schedule approved by the commissioner.
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal interaction with school finance system is possible but not addressed by this statute's operative text.
